{

      },
      {

      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_hedge_request_evh"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_order_execution_evh"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_routed_execution_evh"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dealing.v_bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_execution_result_evh"
      }
    ]
  },
  "instructions": {
    "example_question_sqls": [
      {
        "id": "01eee5376b741717a532b73dd6194585",
        "question": [
          "NOTES"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "* when asking about VeS use dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_hedge_request\r\n",
          "* VeS always joined with dealing.v_bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_execution_result_evh and filter OrderStatus is (Filled or Rejected or Cancelled)\r\n",
          "* VeS means Visual Execution Summary\r\n",
          "* when asking about VeS always show column ExecutionID\r\n",
          "* when asking about VeS use RequestTime to order by desc\r\n",
          "* for HBC use VeS and also filter HedgeExecutionModeID = 1\r\n",
          "* for CBH use VeS and also filter HedgeExecutionModeID = 2\r\n",
          "* for DMA use VeS and also filter HedgeExecutionModeID = 3\r\n",
          "* for DLT use VeS and also filter HedgeServerID = 86\r\n",
          "* for Failed executions use VeS and also filter OrderStatus is Cancelled or Rejected\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "* when asking about ManualVeS use dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_routed_execution_evh\r\n",
          "* ManualVeS always joined with dealing.v_bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_execution_result_evh and filter OrderStatus is (Filled or Rejected or Cancelled) and filter IsManual is true\r\n",
          "* when asking about ManualVeS use StartTime to order by desc\r\n",
          "* for Manual Failed executions use ManualVeS and also filter OrderStatus is Cancelled or Rejected\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "* when asking about VoE use dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_order_execution_evh\r\n",
          "* always join VoE with dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_calculation_step_evh and use EventPayloadRowData_OrderID as join key.\r\n",
          "* VoE means Visual Orders Executions\r\n",
          "* when asking about VoE filter EventPayloadRowData_CalculationSourceType is HedgingProviderHost\r\n",
          "* when asking about VoE without ExecutionID Limit results to 50\r\n",
          "* when the user ask anything about VoE without specifying ExecutionID, it is important to highlight the following message 'Please specify ExecutionID to view inner analysis of an Execution.'\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "* for Crypto filter HedgeServerID is 81 or 83\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "* when asking for more ProviderOrder information about ExecutionID then use VoE with given ExecutionID\r\n",
          "* when asking for more ProviderOrder information about OrderID then use VoE with given OrderID\r\n",
          "* when asking about TTT use dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_fix_message_evh\r\n",
          "* when asking for 'FIX Messages' in ProviderOrder information about ExecutionID use TTT with given ExecutionID to retrieve the FIXData\r\n",
          "* when asking for more ProviderOrder information without giving ExecutionID or OrderID highlight the following message 'Please specify ExecutionID or OrderID for ProviderOrder!' and end\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "* CBH means 'Confirm Before Hedge'\r\n",
          "* HBC means 'Hedge Before Confirm'\r\n",
          "* DLT means 'Crypto germany fully disclosed execution flow'\r\n",
          "* REAL_Futures means 'DMA execution flow into Marex provider'\r\n",
          "* Business flow means 'The execution path used to execute the order'  \r\n",
          "* OMS means 'Order mangement system'\r\n",
          "* OMS Pricing means 'The method used to price the client's order request'\r\n",
          "* TOB means 'Top of the book and its a method used to price the client's order request'"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01eeeac079df1eed868109fe058016ef",
        "question": [
          "OnlyIDs"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "* when asking about ExecSumm use dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_hedge_request\r\n",
          "* ExecSumm always joined with dealing.v_bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_execution_result_evh and filter OrderStatus is (Filled or Rejected or Cancelled)\r\n",
          "* when asking about ExecSumm always show all columns\r\n",
          "* when asking about ExecSumm use RequestTime to order by desc\r\n",
          "* for HBC use ExecSumm and also filter HedgeExecutionModeID = 1\r\n",
          "* for CBH use ExecSumm and also filter HedgeExecutionModeID = 2\r\n",
          "* for DMA use ExecSumm and also filter HedgeExecutionModeID = 3\r\n",
          "* for Failed executions use ExecSumm and also filter OrderStatus is Cancelled or Rejected\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "* when asking about ManualExecSumm use dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_routed_execution_evh\r\n",
          "* ManualExecSumm always joined with dealing.v_bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_execution_result_evh and filter OrderStatus is (Filled or Rejected or Cancelled) and filter IsManual is true\r\n",
          "* when asking about ManualExecSumm use StartTime to order by desc\r\n",
          "* for Manual Failed executions use ManualExecSumm and also filter OrderStatus is Cancelled or Rejected\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "* when asking about OrderExecSumm use dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_order_execution_evh\r\n",
          "* always join OrderExecSumm with dealing.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_investigation_tool_calculation_step_evh and use EventPayloadRowData_OrderID as join key.\r\n",
          "* when asking about OrderExecSumm filter EventPayloadRowData_CalculationSourceType is HedgingProviderHost\r\n",
          "* when asking about OrderExecSumm without giving ExecutionID or OrderID highlight the following message 'Please specify ExecutionID or OrderID!' and end"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
title: Dealing Investigation Tool
